puzzle_room_rules: Puzzle rooms must have a readable entrance and exit direction.
Puzzle inputs should be distributed so the player can parse them from the high-isometric camera.
Puzzle rooms may gate side loot or main progression, but the required state should be explicit in resource data.
Hazard placement must not block all route options unless the puzzle explicitly turns hazards off.
Solution lighting should communicate a solved state without relying on tiny text.
top_down_readability: Use lighting, silhouette, and socket spacing to make puzzle elements readable from the fixed ARPG camera.
